license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.sv8ee9w
title: Preparing DNA samples from mixed sand prior to extraction

steps_raw.instruction: Add 20 mL MilliQ water to pot
Remove plant, if any. Transfer to square petri dish.
Push a 50mL Falcon into the sand up to the 35 mL mark.
Tilt pot to a horizontal position and remove the falcon tube, retaining as much sand as possible. Rotating the tube while removing it may help
Cap and wipe down the tube exterior using a paper towel with 70% EtOH before labelling with pot ID.
Fill tube with sand to the 40mL mark with MilliQ water
Pour through Miracloth into new 50ml tube. Discard the old tube.
Centrifuge tube at 5000 x G for 5 minute.
Add 1ml water and vortex to resuspend.
Transfer to 1.5ml tube for extraction or storage. Dispose of the 50ml tube.
Top up tube to 40 ml total volume with ultrapure water.
